lessons.title: 1.3. Functions of literature (This must come from the syllabus with its serial number)
topics: SUB-TOPIC: 1.3.1. Oral literature (This must come from the syllabus with its serial number)
activities: RATIONALE: This lesson is on Functions of Literature – specifically Oral literature. It is particularly
focused on the use of oral literature (FOLKTALES) in managing cross cutting issues. Through
library/ internet research, brainstorming, analysis and collaboration, learners will acquire a skill of
